scripts.build: npm run build:dotnet && npm run build:npm
scripts.build:npm: npm run build -w @query-grid/core && npm run build -w @query-grid/primeng
scripts.test: npm run test:dotnet && npm run test:npm
scripts.test:npm: npm run build -w @query-grid/core && npm run test -w @query-grid/core && npm run test -w @query-grid/primeng
scripts.pack:npm: npm run build:npm && node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('artifacts/npm',{recursive:true})" && npm pack -w @query-grid/core --pack-destination artifacts/npm && node scripts/pack-primeng.mjs
scripts.publish:npm: npm run build:npm && npm publish -w @query-grid/core --access public --tag preview && npm publish src/npm/packages/primeng/dist --access public --tag preview
scripts.dev:showcase-ui: npm run build:npm && concurrently -k -n core,primeng,ui "npm run watch:core" "npm run watch:primeng" "npm run start -w query-grid-showcase-ui"
